name: Kurt Metzger
bio: Kurt Metzger is an American stand-up comedian, writer, actor, and podcaster known for dark, shock-leaning material. He won an Emmy and a Peabody for his writing on Inside Amy Schumer and has released the album Talks to Young People About Sex and the Comedy Central special White Precious. He hosts the podcast Can't Get Right on the GaS Digital Network. Metzger drew criticism in 2016 for Facebook posts about a sexual-assault allegation against a fellow comedian.

timeline.ev: Releases debut album Kurt Metzger Talks to Young People About Sex
Begins writing on Inside Amy Schumer
Comedy Central airs his hour special White Precious
Launches the podcast Can't Get Right on GaS Digital

accolades: Emmy Award winner for Inside Amy Schumer
Peabody Award winner for Inside Amy Schumer

specials.t: Kurt Metzger Talks to Young People About Sex
